name: You Got Stuck in the Dryer
description:
Why is this so hard...? And why I am I getting so...

Your dumb ass got stuck in the dryer, and now the poor doordash driver has to help you out of your unfortunate situation. Or maybe you planned this entire elaborate scheme to get that extra sausage you've been craving for awhile now.

Requested bot, my second(don't ask) first male character release, and the only male oc I have ready, and am comfortable using, is my Icarus one, cause I don't really care what you do to him. Out of habit, I left it anypov on accident while making it, but I was originally intending it for fempov, but I don't really care who uses it. Also, somehow made it comedic.
creator: IcarusIce
